purpose: Images revealed in a dynamic grid layout with scanning effect. Auto-adapts layout: 1 image = full screen, 2 = side-by-side, 3 = three columns, 4 = 2x2, 5-6 = 2x3 grid. Best for multi-source comparison, evidence overview, before/after sets.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title displayed above the grid. Example: 'Attack Surface Overview'
fields.ACCENT_COLOR: Scan line and corner bracket color. Example: #f59e0b or #22c55e
fields.IMAGE_URL_1: URL to first uploaded grid image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_1 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_2: URL to second uploaded grid image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_2 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_3: URL to third uploaded grid image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_3 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_4: URL to fourth uploaded grid image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_4 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_5: URL to fifth uploaded grid image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_5 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_6: URL to sixth uploaded grid image. Leave as IMAGE_URL_6 if not yet uploaded.
fields.LABEL_1: Label shown at bottom of first image. Example: 'Server Room A'
fields.SUGGESTION_1: Describe exactly what photo or screenshot the user should upload for slot 1. Be specific. Example: 'Upload a photo of the server room or data center'
fields.SUGGESTION_2: Describe what to upload for slot 2. Example: 'Upload a network diagram or infrastructure screenshot'
fields.SUGGESTION_3: Describe what to upload for slot 3. Leave blank if only 2 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_4: Describe what to upload for slot 4. Leave blank if fewer than 4 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_5: Describe what to upload for slot 5. Leave blank if fewer than 5 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_6: Describe what to upload for slot 6. Leave blank if fewer than 6 images are needed.
